name: Lemon-Poppy Muffins
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Beat the egg, salt, and sugar in a bowl until light and fluffy. Add the oil gradually while continuing to beat. Incorporate the milk. Sift together the flour and baking powder several times, then add them to the batter alternately with the milk. Mix in the lemon zest and poppy seeds until fully incorporated. Bake in greased muffin tins for 20-25 minutes.
